scripts.dev: docker compose up -d redis && sleep 2 && concurrently -n backend,frontend,worker -c blue,green,magenta "cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test NEO4J_URI=bolt://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=gravitational ../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 ../.venv/bin/celery -A app.celery_app worker -l info -Q gravitational,dgx -n gravitational_worker@%h"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test NEO4J_URI=bolt://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=gravitational ../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload
scripts.services:start: docker compose up -d postgres redis neo4j localstack && sleep 6 && ./scripts/setup-localstack-s3.sh
scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti :8002 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo Ports 8002 and 5173 freed
scripts.start: docker compose up -d redis && sleep 2 && npm run kill-ports && sleep 2 && concurrently -n backend,frontend,worker -c blue,green,magenta "cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test NEO4J_URI=bolt://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=gravitational ../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload" "cd frontend && npx vite --port 5173 --strictPort" "cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 ../.venv/bin/celery -A app.celery_app worker -l info -Q gravitational,dgx -n gravitational_worker@%h"
scripts.restart: docker compose up -d redis && sleep 2 && npm run kill-ports && sleep 2 && concurrently -n backend,frontend,worker -c blue,green,magenta "cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 AWS_ENDPOINT_URL=http://localhost:4566 AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=test AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=test NEO4J_URI=bolt://localhost:7688 NEO4J_USER=neo4j NEO4J_PASSWORD=gravitational ../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload" "cd frontend && npx vite --port 5173 --strictPort" "cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 ../.venv/bin/celery -A app.celery_app worker -l info -Q gravitational,dgx -n gravitational_worker@%h"
scripts.start:full: npm run services:start && sleep 2 && npm run start
scripts.celery:worker: cd backend && REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/0 ../.venv/bin/celery -A app.celery_app worker -l info -Q gravitational,dgx -n gravitational_worker@%h
